reasoning: This workout directly targets the lactate clearance limiter identified as a key area of improvement. Your last ride was a recovery ride, indicating your readiness for more intensity. We'll focus on the upcoming Alpine Loop, practicing over-unders to build lactate tolerance and improve sustained power during the challenging climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6 sets of 6 minutes alternating between 3 minutes at 201-218W and 3 minutes at 242-256W to mimic the demands of the Alpine Loop ascent.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
